highlights.description: Agent Experience (AX) integration for intelligent error handling and retry logic
OmniVoice provider enhancements with error classification and automatic retry
New `ax/omnivoice.go` helper functions for seamless OmniVoice-core integration

added.description: `omnivoice.Classifier` for ElevenLabs-specific error classification using AX metadata and HTTP status codes
`omnivoice.DefaultRetryConfig()` and `omnivoice.RetryConfigWithCallback()` for configurable retry behavior
TTS provider retry logic with exponential backoff, respecting error retryability
`ax.CategoryForCode()` - Maps AX error codes to `resilience.ErrorCategory`
`ax.IsRetryableCode()` - Checks if an AX error code is retryable
`ax.SuggestionForCode()` - Returns helpful recovery suggestions for each error code
`ax.OperationRequiredFields()` - Returns required fields for 10 ElevenLabs operations
`ax.ToErrorInfo()` - Converts AX code to `resilience.ErrorInfo`
`ax.ClassifyHTTPStatus()` - Classifies HTTP status codes to error categories
`ax.AllCategories()` and `ax.CodesByCategory()` for error code discovery
Integration tests with mock API server for retry scenarios
Performance benchmarks for error classification and retry decisions

changed.description: TTS provider now automatically retries on transient errors (429, 500, 502, 503) with exponential backoff
TTS provider wraps all errors in `resilience.ProviderError` with classification metadata
Auth errors (401, 403), validation errors (400, 422), and not-found errors (404) are not retried

tests.description: 8 integration tests covering retry scenarios (rate limit, auth, server errors, exhausted retries, context cancellation)
14 benchmarks validating performance targets (<1ms classification, <0.1ms retry decision)
7 classifier unit tests and 17 ax/omnivoice helper tests

highlights.description: Organization rename from agentplexus to plexusone with updated module naming convention

fixed.description: Add nolint directives for gosec false positives

highlights.description: STT conformance tests for `TranscribeFile` and `TranscribeURL` batch transcription methods

tests.description: `TranscribeFile` and `TranscribeURL` conformance tests with Ferris Bueller test audio

highlights.description: New Cobra-based CLI (`elevenlabs`) with `tts` and `ttsscript` subcommands for text-to-speech generation
YAML configuration file support with presets for oratory, podcast, and audiobook styles

added.description: Cobra CLI framework with `elevenlabs` command and subcommands
`elevenlabs tts` command for generating speech from text files with SSML and emotion tag support
`elevenlabs ttsscript` command migrated from standalone `cmd/ttsscript`
YAML configuration file support (`--config`) for reusable TTS settings
Built-in presets (`--preset`): `oratory`, `podcast`, `audiobook` with optimized voice settings
Config save functionality (`--save-config`) to export current settings to YAML
Voice settings CLI flags: `--stability`, `--similarity`, `--style`, `--speed`
Automatic output format detection: `.mp3`, `.wav`, `.opus`, `.raw` based on format parameter
`ttsconfig` subpackage with `Config` and `VoiceSettings` types for programmatic TTS configuration
`ttsconfig.Load()` and `ttsconfig.Save()` functions for YAML config file I/O
`ttsconfig.Oratory()`, `ttsconfig.Podcast()`, `ttsconfig.Audiobook()` preset functions
`ttsconfig.EstimateCredits()` and `ttsconfig.FormatDuration()` utility functions for credit calculation
`ttsconfig.StripMarkup()` for removing SSML and emotion tags from text
`--estimate` flag for credit estimation without calling API (shows words, duration, estimated credits)

changed.description: CLI uses `slog.Logger` for structured logging instead of `fmt.Printf`
Default TTS model changed to `eleven_v3` for new CLI commands
Migrated `cmd/ttsscript` standalone CLI to `elevenlabs ttsscript` subcommand

dependencies.description: Add `gopkg.in/yaml.v3` v3.0.1 for YAML config support

highlights.description: WebSocket STT API migrated to scribe_v2_realtime with breaking changes to options and message formats
WebSocket TTS stream completion detection via Done() channel for reliable end-of-stream handling

breaking.description: `WebSocketSTTOptions` fields renamed: `SampleRate`/`Encoding` replaced with `AudioFormat`, `EnableWordTimestamps` replaced with `IncludeTimestamps`, `EnablePartials` removed (partials always enabled)

added.description: `WebSocketSTTOptions.AudioFormat` field for specifying audio encoding (e.g., `pcm_16000`, `ulaw_8000`)
`WebSocketSTTOptions.IncludeTimestamps` field for word-level timing
`WebSocketSTTOptions.IncludeLanguageDetection` field for detected language in responses
`WebSocketSTTOptions.CommitStrategy` field (`manual` or `vad`) for transcript commit control
VAD (Voice Activity Detection) settings: `VADSilenceThresholdSecs`, `VADThreshold`, `MinSpeechDurationMs`, `MinSilenceDurationMs`
`WebSocketSTTConnection.Commit()` method for manual transcript commit
`WebSocketSTTConnection.SendAudioWithCommit()` method for sending audio with optional commit
`WebSocketSTTConnection.SessionID()` method to retrieve server-assigned session ID
`WebSocketTTSConnection.Done()` channel for stream completion detection after `Flush()`
OmniVoice TTS and STT provider conformance tests
OmniVoice capabilities documentation with interface implementation matrix

changed.description: WebSocket STT now uses query parameters for configuration instead of init message
Audio data sent as `input_audio_chunk` message type with `audio_base_64` field
OmniVoice conversion utilities updated for new STT options structure
OmniVoice TTS provider uses `Done()` channel and inactivity timeout for reliable stream completion
OmniVoice TTS `GetVoice()` returns `tts.ErrVoiceNotFound` for invalid voice IDs

documentation.description: `TRD_STT.md` technical requirements document for WebSocket STT migration
WebSocket TTS stream completion behavior documentation with usage patterns

highlights.description: Native telephony audio format support (ulaw, alaw, G.711) for seamless Twilio Media Streams integration

added.description: Telephony codec support in OmniVoice format mapping: `ulaw`, `mulaw`, `g711u` -> `ulaw_8000` and `alaw`, `g711a` -> `alaw_8000`
Recognition of `ulaw_`, `alaw_`, `opus_` prefixes as valid ElevenLabs output formats
8kHz PCM output format (`pcm_8000`) for telephony sample rates

internal.description: Exclude local `omnivoice/examples/` from version control (examples moved to `agentplexus/omnivoice-examples`)

highlights.description: OmniVoice provider integration - use ElevenLabs as a drop-in TTS/STT/Agent provider in the OmniVoice voice pipeline framework

added.description: OmniVoice TTS provider (`omnivoice/tts`) implementing `tts.Provider` and `tts.StreamingProvider` interfaces
OmniVoice STT provider (`omnivoice/stt`) implementing `stt.Provider` and `stt.StreamingProvider` interfaces
OmniVoice Agent provider (`omnivoice/agent`) with session management for conversational AI
Format conversion utilities for mapping OmniVoice configs to ElevenLabs parameters
Debug and simple TTS examples (`examples/debug-test`, `examples/simple`)

documentation.description: OmniVoice integration guide with TTS, STT, and Agent provider documentation
Rebuild MkDocs site with OmniVoice section

internal.description: Migrate to structured-changelog format for machine-readable changelog

highlights.description: Null handling fix for API responses, voice settings presets for learning platforms, and PCM-to-WAV audio utilities

fixed.description: JSON decoding errors for nullable API response fields using ogen-tools post-processing (`ogen-fixnull`, `ogen-fixerror`)

added.description: Voice settings presets for learning platforms: Udemy, YouTube, TikTok, podcast, audiobook, and more
PCM to WAV audio conversion utilities (`PCMBytesToWAV`, `PCMToWAV`)
`ParseAPIError()` function for structured error extraction from API responses
`IsForbiddenError()` helper for 403 status code detection
Output format validation for TTS requests

documentation.description: Voice settings presets guide for LMS courses

highlights.description: Real-time voice agent capabilities: WebSocket STT/TTS streaming, speech-to-speech conversion, and Twilio phone integration

added.description: WebSocket TTS streaming for real-time text-to-speech synthesis
WebSocket STT streaming for real-time speech-to-text transcription
Speech-to-speech conversion service for voice transformation
Twilio phone integration for telephony voice agents
`cmd/ttsscript` CLI for batch TTS generation from scripts

highlights.description: MkDocs documentation site with comprehensive API reference and guides

added.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Comprehensive service documentation for all ElevenLabs APIs
Getting started guides, examples, and utility documentation

highlights.description: Initial release - comprehensive Go client for ElevenLabs API with TTS, STT, voice cloning, and audio generation services

added.description: Text-to-Speech (TTS) service with streaming support and voice settings
Speech-to-Text (STT) transcription service
Voice management: list, get, clone, and design voices
Voice design service for creating custom AI voices
Text-to-Dialogue service for multi-speaker conversations
Sound effects generation service
Music generation service
Audio isolation service for removing background noise
Dubbing service for video localization
Forced alignment service for audio-text synchronization
Projects service for managing long-form content
Pronunciation dictionary service with PLS export
History service for accessing generated audio
User and subscription management
Models service for listing available TTS models
Retry HTTP client wrapper for resilient API calls
TTSScript compiler for scripted audio generation
Premade voices package with voice metadata and filtering
